title: God's Anger.
content:
God can't be wrathful: but we may conclude
    Wrathful He may be by similitude:
    God's wrathful said to be, when He doth do
    That without wrath which wrath doth force us to.
meaning:
"God's Anger." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
